state_scheme_name: TN Special Mango Scheme 2024-25 + NHM-MIDH HDP
subsidy_per_ha_inr: 9840 (HDP) + Orchard rejuvenation 26540 acres + bio-input package 6175 acres
policy_notes: PRICE CRASH EVENT: Mango prices fell below ₹500/quintal (₹5/kg) in TN markets. TN CM wrote to PM requesting MIS under PM-AASHA; proposed ₹276.6/quintal compensation (₹2,766/ton, 50:50 Central-State, est. ₹62.93 crore). GST reduction request: 12%→5% on mango pulp. Statewide farmer protest Jun 10, 2025 in Krishnagiri, Dharmapuri, Salem, Namakkal districts. Centre approved compensation for Karnataka; TN awaiting approval.

Banana harvest season. PMFBY insurance active for Coimbatore district. TNIAMP sucker subsidy ₹26,250/ha supports production. TN Banana Scheme ₹12.73 cr: area expansion 5220 acres + wind protection (propping) + quality sleeves. APEDA Cluster Development Programme - TN banana in export cluster. India-Russia banana export agreement (first shipment Feb 2024).

Pre-arrival season (HP/Kashmir apple harvest Aug-Nov). Cold storage stock depleting → prices typically 20-40% higher in Coimbatore market. Import duty 50% BCD protects domestic supply from cheap imports. No local TN production policy applicable.

Off-season for beetroot in Coimbatore; limited supply. Price typically 1.5-2x harvest season levels. NHM off-season incentive ₹2,500/ha encourages summer cultivation. Uzhavar Santhai price transparency scheme active.

Off-season beans in Coimbatore; lower supply from local farms. Price typically elevated (40-70% above peak season). NHM polyhouse subsidy 50% enables protected cultivation to extend supply. Shade-net subsidy 50% up to 4000 sqm for off-season vegetable farming.
Maize MSP ₹2400/quintal acts as price floor (CACP/CCEA). MSP announced this month for new KMS. PM-KISAN income support active for eligible farmers. NFSM seed/demo support.

Private bank loan repayment crisis for farmers (pledged jewellery as collateral). Similar distress in Tiruchirappalli and Coimbatore belt.
